name: juna
description: Frontend asset pipeline for the Juna website

scripts.build: npm run copy:htmx && npm run build:css
scripts.vercel-install: python -m pip install --disable-pip-version-check -r requirements.txt && npm ci --include=dev
scripts.vercel-build: DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=config.production_settings python manage.py check && DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=config.production_settings python manage.py check --deploy && python manage.py test && npm run build && DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=config.production_settings python manage.py collectstatic --noinput
